assumptions: Uses Gemini Developer API paid-tier text/image/video rates.
Output token pricing includes thinking tokens per provider pricing table.
Audio-specific rates are not used for receipt extraction in this project.
Context cache storage token-hour charges are modeled for forward compatibility but not currently metered by this gateway.

metadata.notes: Primary production model for receipt extraction.
